Who was the pioneer (Agua) of the systematic collection of 
genealogical introductions (Parichay Sangraha)?
Sadupadhyaya Gunakar.
11293
During what approximate years did Gunakar live?
His life was approximately from 1275 to 1350 A.D.
11294
Which Karnat dynasty king is associated with the formalisation of 
the Panji system?
Maharaja Harasimha Dev.
11295
Who was the son of Gunakar who continued his genealogical work? Pranadhar.
11296
Name the four sons of Anandakar who were involved in the Panji 
management.
Kathi, Madhav, Keshav, and Narayan.
11297
What is the primary purpose of the Panji system as defined by the 
text?
To ensure lineage purity (Jati Shuddhi) and blood purity (Rakta 
Shuddhi) for marriages.
11298
Who was the author of the 'Tantravarttika' which mentions 
genealogical record-keeping in the 8th century?
Kumarila Bhatta.
11299
Which ancient text's 'Bal Kanda' is cited to show the tradition of 
examining lineage before marriage?
The Valmiki Ramayana.
11300
Who were the five sons of Raul Thame in the Loam Suragan 
branch?
Chandeshwar, Dhareshwar, Someshwar, Bhogishwar, and 
Yogishwar.
11301
Which son of Raul Thame was a resident of Keunti and a scholar of 
all four Vedas?
Chandeshwar.
11302
The sons of Gaean were Vishweshwar and _____.
Sureshwar
11303
Who was the son of Gunakar mentioned as a Mahamahopadhyaya?
Pathak Govinda.
11304
What was the profession of Nageshwar, the son of Shambhola?
He was a respected lawyer (B.L.).
11305
Name the sons of Nageshwar mentioned in the Purnia branch.
Dilip, Pradeep, and Sudhir.
11306
In the Dharmapur branch, who is the son of Ramanand working as 
an Agriculture Director?
Ashutosh Kishore.
11307
Who was the mother of Maharaja Ramchandra Narayan?
Maharani Vedavati.
11308
Which Queen is credited with building schools, roads, and ponds 
during a famine?
Queen Indraivati.
11309
Who were the sons of the medical expert Dhiranath?
Bachcha, Mahesh, Rajballabh, and Ganesh.
11310
Which historical figure was the father of the Mahakavi Vidyapati's 
patron (Maharaja Shiva Singh)?
Maharaja Deva Singh (implied by the Shiva Singh reference in the 
context of Mahipati Jha).
11311
The lineage originating from the village Pandua Mahitarpur is 
known as the _____ lineage.
Pandua
11312
Who were the two sons of Prithvidhar?
Manohar and Manodhar.
11313
Which son of Manodhar was also a renowned grammarian 
(Vaiyakarana)?
Mahopadhyaya Hemkar.
11314
What is the name of the scholar who taught the Panji Shastra to 
many students?
Mahopadhyaya Gunakar.
11315
Who was the son of Pranadhar whose four sons were 'Takwal'?
Anandakar.
11316
The sons of Kathi who became experts in the Panji Shastra were 
Ramkar, Ratnakar, and _____.
Shubhankar
11317
Who were the sons of Ramkar mentioned in the Pandua lineage?
Ladavan (Buddhikar) and Nonen.
11318
Which branch of the family is associated with 'Chunapur'?
The branch of Jhotan Jha.
11319
Who were the sons of the teacher Vinod mentioned in the 
Baradbatta branch?
Shailendra and Somendra.
11320
In the Baradbatta branch, who was the father of the grammarian 
Kalikanti?
Kedarnath.
11321
Name the sons of Kalikanti in the Baradbatta branch.
Shankar, Balgovind, and Vinod.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
11322
Who is the son of Jayanarayan mentioned as the first motor 
mechanic of Purnia district?
Rai Jayanarayan.
11323
What are the names of Rai Jayanarayan's sons?
Rai Harinarayan, Rai Satyanarayan, and Rai Tejanarayan.
11324
The historical ruler of Hansara (Ancient Purnia) was _____.
Maharaja Samar Singh
11325
What are the names of the sons of Rai Kripa Narayan?
Bhagwati Narayan.
11326
Who was the father of Rai Bhagwati Narayan's sons (Manoj, 
Kumod, and Vinod)?
Rai Kripa Narayan.
11327
Which scholar is noted for being a 'Pulse Specialist' (Nadi 
Visheshagya)?
Ganesh (son of Dhiranath).
11328
Who was the son of Gunakar noted as the primary person to record 
the lineage information?
Sadupadhyaya Gunakar.
11329
The sons of Chatur Narayan (Chilka) include King Devanarayan 
and King _____.
Shri Narayan
11330
Who were the sons of King Devanarayan?
King Ramnarayan and King Rupnarayan.
11331
Name the sons of King Rajaram Narayan.
Rai Kshetryanarayan, Rai Gopal Narayan, Rai Virnarayan, and Rai 
Hemnarayan.
11332
Who was the son of Rai Virnarayan noted as 'Phucchi'?
Rai Baldev Narayan.
11333
Which son of Gopalakanti is a journalist (Patrakar)?
B.L. Vidyanand.
11334
Who were the sons of Shaktirayapur Narun Mishra Prayag?
Ganga and Jagdish.
11335
Name the sons of Mishra Raghuni.
Harijeev, Hari, and Dhanaram.
11336
Who was the son of Mishra Dhanaram?
Atmaram.
11337
Name the sons of Mishra Atmaram.
Sanjeev, Chiranjeev, and Sabhapati.
11338
Who were the sons of Mishra Sabhapati?
Matini, Shankardutt, and Devidutt.
11339
Which son of Mishra Shankardutt lived in Dharmapur?
Srinath.
11340
Name the sons of Mishra Srinath.
Padarth, Chintamani, and Katyananda.
11341
Who were the sons of Mishra Padarth?
Kedarnath, Raghunath, and Umanath.
11342
Who is the principal with an M.A. and Ph.D. in the Narun branch?
Jayaprakash Narayan.
11343
Who was the son of Jayaprakash Narayan (the Principal)?
Aditya Narayan.
11344
Name the two sons of Lalit mentioned in the Narun branch.
Akshadhar and Durgadhar.
11345
Who were the sons of Akshadhar?
Haridev, Digambar, and Shridhar.
11346
Who was the son of Haridev mentioned in the Narun branch?
Narendra.
11347
Name the two sons of Digambar.
Sanjeev and Rajeev.
11348
In the Narun branch, who was the son of Shridhar?
Khalifa.
11349
Who were the sons of Lalit's son Jalandhar?
Shalandhar and Shatrughna.
11350
Name the sons of Shatrughna.
Subhash and Shankar.
11351
Who were the sons of Shashidhar?
Rameshwar and Kapileshwar.
11352
Name the sons of Rameshwar in the Narun branch.
Madhav, Gangesh, and Lambodara.
11353
Who were the sons of Vyakarana Gunakar mentioned as scholars?
Gunakar and his son Pranadhar.
11354
Which document lists the 'Guna-Dosha' (merits and demerits) of 
families to determine marriage suitability?
The Panji (genealogical records).
11355
Who was the son of Rai Rupnarayan?
Rai Rurnarayan.
11356
Name the two sons of Maharaja Shri Narayan.
King Rajendra Narayan and King Mahendra Narayan.
11357
Who was the son of Maharaja Mahendra Narayan?
Ruchaudhari.
11358
In the Dharmapur branch, who is the bank officer with an M.Sc. in 
Agriculture?
Ashutosh (son of Ramanand).
11359
What is the chronological span covered by the genealogical 
mapping (Panji Prabandha) of Mithila mentioned in the text?
450 AD to 2009 AD.
11360
Which historical scholar and manager of the Panji system lived 
between 1300 and 1375 AD?
Lakhima Devi.
11361
What was the primary contribution of Lakhima Devi to the Panji 
system?
Developing the evolutionary path of Panji management and 
recording Dharmashastra.
11362
The Panji system classifies Brahmin lineages based on which four 
primary criteria?
Mool, Utetdh, Gotra, and Patra.
11363
Which specific Gotra is associated with the Gangoli Mool in the 
genealogical records?
Sandilya Gotra.
11364
Who introduced the 'Shakha Pustak' method to record Kulin 
Brahmin lineage and matrimonial links?
Panji Devanand Jha (also known as Choti Jha).
11365
Which dynasty provided patronage to Panji Devanand Jha in the 
village of Rasaad, Purnia?
The Surgan Loam dynasty.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
11366
Who is identified as the founder of the Hindu Shara and Soriya 
Brahmin dynasties in Purnia around 1550 AD?
Maharaja Samar Singh.
11367
Who was the author of the Ayurvedic text 'Vedanand Vinod'?
Raja Bahadur Vedanand Singh.
11368
Which member of the Banaili family authored the book 'Banaili: 
Roots to Raj'?
Kumar Girijanand Singh (Raman Ji).
11369
Which Banaili family member served as the Education Minister of 
Bihar and President of the Hindu Mahasabha?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
11370
Who was the 'Sangeet Martand' of the Banaili family, known for his 
expertise in music?
Kumar Shyanamanand Singh.
11371
What were the four major estates or 'Dyodhis' of the Banaili Raj 
mentioned in the text?
Ramnagar, Champanagar, Srinagar, and Garh Banaili.
11372
Raja Kirtyanand Singh of the Banaili Raj was active during which 
specific years?
1880 to 1938.
11373
Which Banaili branch is specifically associated with the 'Khadgi 
Jha' lineage?
Banaili Khadgi Jha.
11374
Which Banaili branch is specifically associated with the 'Chanan 
Jha' lineage?
Banaili Chanan Jha.
11375
The record mentions a specialist in the 'Swadeshi Movement' and 
agriculture; who was he?
Kumar Vimalanand Singh.
11376
Who served as the Vice-Chancellor of the Sanskrit University and 
was a prominent figure in the Swaraj Party?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
11377
Which village is identified as the origin or 'Biji' of the Samraul Pali 
Brahmin line?
Pali.
11378
In the genealogical entries, what is the significance of the term 
'Dau'?
It indicates maternal grandfather or lineage descent through a 
daughter (Dauhitra).
11379
Who was the son of Maharaja Samar Singh and a key figure in the 
Purnia Brahmin lineage?
Maharaj Amar Singh.
11380
Which text was revised and re-edited by Kumar Girijanand Singh?
Vedanand Vinod.
11381
The term 'Mool' in the Panji system refers to the _____.
Ancestral village or root of a lineage.
11382
Which specific branch of the family moved from Banaili to 
Srinagar?
Raja Shrinandan Singh's lineage.
11383
Who was the 'Shikari Samrat' (King of Hunters) and weather expert 
in the Banaili family?
Raja Kirtyanand Singh.
11384
Which member of the family is noted for building a Sanskrit 
Pathshala in Kashi (Varanasi)?
Rani Chataravati (wife of Kumar Chatranand Singh).
11385
The genealogist Choti Jha spent his entire life under the protection 
of which Purnia-based royal family?
Surgan Loam.
11386
According to the Panji records, who was the 'Biji' (founding 
ancestor) of the Pali village line?
Kapildev.
11387
Which title was held by Vedanand Singh, reflecting his status in the 
Banaili family?
Raja Bahadur.
11388
Who was the 'Dharmadhikaranak' (Officer of Justice) mentioned in 
the lineage of Lakhima Devi?
Mahamahopadhyaya Gadadhar.
11389
Which village served as the residence for the family of Amarnath 
Jha in Purnia?
Teacher Colony.
11390
What was the professional title of Phanishwarnath, a descendant of 
Shyanamanand?
B.A. (Bachelor of Arts), indicating his educational qualification.
11391
Which specific discipline was Ganganand Singh a 'shining star' of 
in the literary sky of Mithila?
Maithili Literature.
11392
The Panji records for the 'Bagani Rupaspur' branch are found on 
which page of the first volume?
Page 134.
11393
Who was the 'Mahamahopadhyaya' who was a contemporary of the 
scholar Lakhima Devi?
Rameshwar.
11394
Which lineage is linked to the village of 'Sultanpur' and the 'Palasi' 
region?
The descendants of Raghupati.
11395
Who was the daughter of Raja Dular Singh whose marriage is noted 
in the Sarisab lineage?
Dulahiti.
11396
In the context of the Banaili Raj, what is 'Garh Banaili'?
A central fort or administrative seat of the Banaili estate.
11397
The text mentions a 'Sangeet Martand'; what does this title signify?
A person with the highest mastery or 'Sun' of music.
11398
Which village is associated with the 'Kanjha' or 'Khadgi' branch of 
the family?
Banaili.
11399
Who is the 'Biji' ancestor of the Alayigar Bagani line?
Gangadhar.
11400
Which descendant of Raja Dular Singh was known for his expertise 
in the Ayurveda Shastra?
Raja Vedanand Singh.
11401
Who was the 'Anhal' ancestor in the lineage of Vishnupur?
Hariam.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
11402
Which family member was an engineer (Abhiyanta) in the branch 
of Girijanand?
Raman Ji.
11403
What is the primary language used for the titles and names in the 
genealogical map?
Maithili (written in Devanagari script).
11404
Who was the father of the music expert Kumar Shyanamanand 
Singh?
Raja Kirtyanand Singh.
11405
Which descendant of the Pali line is noted as a 'Sanchar Nideshak' 
(Director of Communications)?
Abhiyanta Shankar.
11406
Which town in Nepal is mentioned as being near the residence of 
one of the descendants (Pankaj)?
Janakpur.
11407
Who was the 'Panji Manager' during the period of 1300â€“1375 
AD?
Lakhima Devi.
11408
The term 'Utehtdh' in the Panji system refers to a subdivision 
related to _____.
Lineage purity and social standing.
11409
Which village is associated with the 'Sudar Sodarpur' lineage?
Parshmani.
11410
Who was the 'B.A. Bank Officer' mentioned in the Purnia branch?
Kavitar Jha.
11411
Which ancestor is linked to the 'Kakarol' and 'Mahiya Sodarpur' 
branches?
Mahesh Dutt.
11412
Who is identified as the 'Tantrik' (practitioner of Tantra) in the 
Taranagar branch?
Nityanand Singh.
11413
The 'Dyodhi' system in the text refers to which social structure?
Royal households or sub-estates within a larger Raj.
11414
Who was the 'Education Minister' of Bihar mentioned as part of the 
Banaili family?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
11415
Which person is noted for his role in the 'Swaraj Party'?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
11416
The text spans generations of the 'Maithil' community; which 
specific caste group is the focus?
Maithil Brahmins.
11417
What does the term 'Pustak' signify in the context of Choti Jha's 
work?
A genealogical register or record book.
11418
What is the chronological scope covered by the 'Genealogical 
Mapping' within the 'Panji Prabandh' text?
The records span from 450 AD to 2009 AD.
11419
In the context of the Panji records, who is recorded as the husband 
of Manjula?
Subhash Kumar.
11420
Identify the residence associated with Rajkumar and Subhash 
Kumar's wife, Manjula.
They are residents of Jamua.
11421
According to the text, who are the two sons of Ashok Mishra, a 
resident of Timardoul?
Arun Kumar and Aditya.
11422
Who is listed as the daughter of Mahant Jha and a resident of 
Jamua?
Manjula.
11423
The lineage of Parmanand includes three sons named Shyambodh, 
Jagatnath, and _____.
Kedarnath.
11424
Who is the son of Jagatnath and a resident of Purnia?
Ayush.
11425
What professional title is held by Vijay Kumar at Kameshwar Singh 
Sanskrit University, Darbhanga?
Professor and Registrar.
11426
Identify the two sons of Professor Vijay Kumar mentioned in the 
genealogical map.
Bhaskar and Prabhakar.
11427
In the lineage of Jattalal, who is his son?
Tilak.
11428
Following the lineage of Jattalal, who is the son of Tilak?
Tilaknath.
11429
Within the descendants of Tilaknath, who is the son of Uchitlal?
Vriddhanand.
11430
Who are the sons of Vriddhanand as listed in the records of Range-
ra?
Gopikanth, Vedanand, Nawal Kishore, Shambhunath, Anati, 
Anuplal, and Purushottam.
11431
Identify the residence and familial link of Rasmohan Jha.
He is a resident of Susena and the father-in-law of Sushil Kumar.
11432
Who is the son of Babulal and the father of Parmanand, 
Dharmanand, and Sarvanand?
Vishnudev.
11433
The daughters of Shyambodh are listed as Sweety, Rani, Supriya, 
and _____.
Kajal.
11434
Which village is associated with the family of Gajanand and 
Triloknath?
Dholbajja.
11435
Who is the son of Triloknath and the father of Neeraj, Dheeraj, and 
Rupesh?
Uchiti.
11436
Identify the two sons of Gajanand mentioned in the text.
Triloknath and Sanjay.
11437
Which location is cited for the family of Nand Kumar, son of 
Matnu Lal?
Gangoli.
11438
Who are the four sons of Reetlal listed in the lineage of Gangoli?
Ramkrishna, Harikrishna, Devkrishna, and Chitrabodh.
11439
Identify the daughter of Reetlal who married Lekhnath from Araria 
Badgam.
Purnima.

Who is the father of Rajesh and Rakesh, residents of Jamua?
Gokulanand.
11441
In the lineage of Harikrishna, who are his two sons?
Gokulanand and Mathuranand.
11442
Identify the professional role of Satyanand, son of Shivanand, as 
mentioned in the Nepal section.
He is an Engineer residing in America.
11443
Who is the son of Satyanand residing in America?
Dr Nashira.
11444
Within the Sultanpur region, who are the two sons of Ravi Dev?
Shivdev and Raghudev.
11445
Identify the seven sons of Shivdev listed in the Mahnora lineage.
Parmanand, Sadanand, Nityanand, Bhavanand, Manohar, 
Damodar, and Ghanshyam.
11446
Who are the three sons of Nityanand mentioned in the Sultanpur 
records?
Vishwanath, Kashinath, and Baidyanath.
11447
Identify the daughter of Bechan who is a resident of Silha.
Manorama.
11448
Who are the four sons of Chaturkishore in the Mahishi Pali lineage? Girijanand, Yoganand, Krishnanand, and Rudranand.
11449
In the lineage of Krishnanand, who are his three sons?
Shyambodh, Sribodh, and Jaybodh.
11450
Identify the professional titles held by Shyambodh, son of 
Krishnanand.
Vyakaranacharya, Jyotishacharya, and Karmakandi.
11451
Who is the son of Shyambodh who serves as an Engineer?
Om Prakash.
11452
Who are the two sons of Sribodh mentioned as residents of 
Teghachia?
Neeraj and Kundan.
11453
In the context of the Sultanpur Desh, who is the son of Bhava Dutt 
residing in Beht?
Aniruddh.
11454
Identify the three sons of Aniruddh mentioned in the Sultanpur 
Desh records.
Shobhakanth, Suryakanth, and Mahakanth.
11455
Who is the son of Shobhakanth and resident of Bhareshwar?
Subhash and Prakash.
11456
In the lineage of Patuaha Saharsa, who is the father of Vadan?
Bacchi.
11457
Who are the two sons of Naresh Mohan, a resident of Patuaha?
Naresh and Mohan.
11458
Identify the son of Modnarayan in the Belahi lineage.
Vishwanath.
11459
Who is the son of Vishwanath in the Belahi branch?
Buddhilal.
11460
Within the Raghunathpur lineage, who is the son of Banshidhar?
Thotha.
11461
Identify the son of Thotha in the Raghunathpur branch.
Bhanu.
11462
In the Maduaha branch, who is the father of Shyama?
Poshan.
11463
Who is the son of Shyama in the Maduaha lineage?
Gopal.
11464
Identify the sons of Gopal in the Maduaha records.
Jatir, Chumman, Newalal, Devanand, and Panchanand.
11465
In the Nepal Silathi lineage, who is the son of Shivadutt?
Jeebu.
11466
Who is the son of Jeebu in the Nepal Silathi branch?
Baburam.
11467
Identify the five sons of Shivanand in the Nepal lineage.
Satyanand, Santoshanand, Shashi, Satish, and Shekharanand.
11468
In the Dibda branch, who are the two sons of Vishveshwar?
Shyamdev and Manbodh.
11469
Who is the son of Shyamdev in the Dibda branch?
Pinku.
11470
Identify the father of Umesh, Ramesh, Dinesh, and Kedar in the 
Sultanpur lineage.
Mula.
11471
In the Mahishi Pali branch, how many marriages are recorded for 
Bhavani Dutt Jha?
Fourteen marriages.
11472
Who are the three sons of Manmohan in the Mahishi Pali lineage?
Jaykanth, Srikanth, and Harikanth.
11473
Identify the two sons of Harikanth mentioned in the records.
Tarakanth and Yogakanth.
11474
Who is the father of Dheeraj and Anuj, both of whom hold BA 
degrees?
Pramod.
11475
In the North Khanda branch of Mahishi, who are the two sons of 
Gopal?
Nand Kishore and Raghuvir.
11476
Identify the three sons of Nand Kishore in the North Khanda branch. Sundar, Mukund, and Kulanand.
11477
In the Raghunathpur Dharampur branch, who are the two sons of 
Amritnath?
Chintamani and another not explicitly named in that specific sub-
list.
11478
Who is the son of Chintamani in the Raghunathpur branch?
Yashodhar.
11479
Identify the son of Yashodhar in the Raghunathpur branch.
Satyanarayan.
11480
In the Sultanpur Belbari branch, who are the two sons of Pitambar?
Basuki and Ganganand.
11481
Identify the son of Ganganand who resides in Araria.
Gagan Dev.
11482
Who are the three sons of Ravi mentioned in the Mangrauni Pali

Yashu, Raju, and another not fully named.
11483
In the Sadupadhyay lineage, who are the five sons of Horeshwar?
Harishwar, Ruchi, Bhavanath, Ramanath, and Haldhar.
11484
Who is the son of Horeshwar whose title is 'Ratnapani'?
Sadupadhyay Horeshwar.

Upadhyay Padamanki Ramapati.

How many marriages are recorded for Bhava Dutt Jha in the Balua 
branch?
Twelve marriages.

Who are the four sons of Adinath in the Balua branch?
Lalitanath, Gopinath, Pushpanath, and Ratinath.
11488
Identify the son of Radhakanth who is a resident of Rahatmina.
Shivanand.
11489
In the Rahatmina branch, who are the four sons of Shivanand?
Jagatnath, Amarnath, Dwarikanath, and Devnath.
11490
Who are the six sons of Srikanth in the Rahatmina branch?
Shambhunath, Shankar, Brajnath, Suryanath, Ganganath, and 
Snehmath.

The genealogical mapping documented in the 'Mithila Panji 
Prabandh' covers the timeline from 450 AD to which year?
2009 AD

In the context of the Panji records, what is the meaning of the term 
'Sut'?
Son

In Maithil genealogical terminology, the term 'Suta' is used to 
denote a _____.
Daughter

Which specific professional designation is associated with 
Achchadhar, husband of the daughter of Hemu?
Grammarian (Vaiyakaran)
11495
Who were the three sons of Jirkshina as recorded in the Sultanpur 
region?
Balakrishna, Devakrishna, and Shrikrishna
11496
In the Sultanpur/Tegachhiya lineage, who is identified as the son of 
Srinath?
Manbodh
11497
What relationship does the term 'Dau' signify in the Panji 
genealogical entries?
Maternal grandfather
11498
In the Phulbari branch, Naval Kishor's son Ramanand had three 
sons: Punyanand, Mahendra, and _____.
Devendra
11499
Who was the wife of the resident of Rashadh, Achchadhar?

11500
The sons of Grihinatha (Tengari) were Mitranath, Ramanath, and 
_____.
Kalanand
11501
Identify the sons of Dharmanatha as listed in the Sultanpur records.
Bhavanatha and Devanatha
11502
Who were the three sons of Bhavanatha recorded in the text?
Varuna, Vijayesh, and Umesh
11503
In the Bathanaha (Sultanpur) branch, who was the father of

Braj Kishor
11504
Who is the son of Naval Kishor associated with the village of 
Baradaha?
Ganesh

The daughters of Jhapat in the Phulbari region were Jaymukhi,

Sarla

Madanpur
13077
Mishru Vijay, an official in Araria, has sons named Dheeraj, 
Nayan, Pranay, and _____.
Raushan
13078
Who is the son of Prasannalal associated with the Sakuri Sakaradhi 
origin?
Umakant
13079
Umeshkant's sons, Vijay, Ashok, and Subodh, reside in _____.
Khokha
13080
Who is the son of Basudev residing in Rahatmina and related to 
Khangud Sarisav?
Girijanand
13081
Who is the son of Yogananand (son of Biharilal) residing in Chakla 
Dahariya?
Nokhelal and Purandar
13082
Identify the son of Nokhelal residing in Jayanagar.
Shambhunath
13083
The son of Ruranand, named Laxmikant, is a resident of _____.
Jayanagar
13084
Who are the sons of Grihinath associated with the Dari Pavanchobh 
origin?
Jagmohan and Viryamohan
13085
Jagmohan's son, Chandranand, is a resident of which village?
Paramanpur
13086
Who is the son of Chandramani in the Sodarapur Mahia lineage?
Mahinath
13087
Mahinath's sons include Vasudev, Baldev, Dharmadev, and _____.
Varundev
13088
The son of Manmohan, named Tengari, is associated with which 
origin?
Sakaradhi
13089
Who is the son of Ramkrishna (Bhutai) residing in Kolhua?
Garibnath (Keshavnath)
13090
Keshavnath's sons, Ramesh and Vinod Kumar, are residents of 
which village?
Ramnagar
13091
The lineage of Chumman in the Sultanpur Pategana area belongs to 
the _____ Mool.
Sodarapur Tetarihar
13092
Jagdish's sons, Ramkrishna and Rameshwar, reside in which two 
villages?
Sohagmadar and Palasi
13093
In the Budhwade Gangora Mool of Pategana, who is the son of 
Hemnath?
Somnath (Babulal)
13094
Who is the son of Babulal identified as Laxmidatt?
Laxmidatt
13095
The son of Laxmidatt, named Bhimdatt, has sons named Lalit, Lal, 
Nidhi, and _____.
Shambhu
13096
Identify the son of Nidhi in the Budhwade Gangora lineage.
Khooni
13097
Who is the son of Khooni residing in Koilakh?
Umesh
13098
Umesh's sons, Laxmikant and Shobhakant, reside in _____.
Vina Babhanagama
13099
The son of Amritnath in the Kurma lineage is _____.
Bhorelal
13100
Who are the sons of Bhorelal identified as residents of Malangia 
Kujouli?
Munilal and Sundarlal
13101
The son of Munilal, named Shukdev, is associated with the _____ 
origin.
Mahia Sodarapur
13102
Shukdev's sons residing in Palasi are named _____.
Jaykant and Navkant
13103
In the Pategana Brahmpura Mool, who is the son of Khelanand?
Punyanand
13104
Who is the son of Chandramani in the Sandahpur Mool of 
Pategana?
Mahinath
13105
In the context of Maithil genealogy, what does the term 'Sut' signify? It denotes a son.
13106
What is the specific meaning of the term 'Suta' in genealogical 
records?
It refers to a daughter.
13107
Define the term 'Sutau' as used when listing descendants.
It indicates the presence of exactly two sons.
13108
The term _____ is used in these records to refer to multiple 
daughters of an individual.
Sutech
13109
In Maithil 'Panji' or genealogical entries, what does 'Dau' represent?
The maternal grandfather's lineage.
13110
What is the specific relationship indicated by the term 'Du Dau'?
The maternal grandfather of one's father.
13111
Which individual in the Darihara Deeh lineage is identified as a 
former Cabinet Minister in the Bihar Government?
Sarayug Lal.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
13112
Who was the senior Congress leader and father of the Cabinet 
Minister Sarayug Lal?
Janak Lal.
13113
The title 'Vaiyaakaran' (Grammarian) is specifically attributed to 
which son of Shridhar?
Yashodhar.
13114
Which professional title is associated with Sundarkant in the 
Darihara records?
Jyotishi (Astrologer).
13115
Identify the two sons of Ramanand mentioned in the Sultanpur 
lineage.
Rai and Baheradhi.
13116
According to the Sultanpur records, where is the family of Mishra 
Fekan located?
To the north of the ancient pond in Sahbajpur.
13117
In the genealogy of Sultanpur, who are the sons of Thakurdatta?
Gopal, Dulardatta, Ram, Vishwanath, and Dinbandhu.
13118
Which village is designated as the root for the 'Kanasam Mool' in 
the Mander records?
Mander (also known as Madre).
13119
In the Darihara Deeh lineage, who are the two sons of Durlabh 
Narayan?
Sadanand and Jagannath.
13120
The heading 'Sultanpur Deshe Jamua' marks the genealogical 
records for which branch?
The Jamua branch of the Sultanpur region.
13121
Who are the three sons of Kamalanand (alias Bhutkun) in the 
Jamua lineage?
Rajendra, Devendra, and Ajendra.
13122
Which son of Ajablal is associated with the lineage in Jamua 
through the daughter of Dhirnath?
Baidyanath.
13123
In the Sultanpur Jamua branch, identify the sons of Sheetlakant.
Nagendra and Mahendra.
13124
Who are the sons of Upendra mentioned in the Darihara Fulbadia 
records?
Samarendra, Nagendra, Surendra, Virendra, Dhirendra, and 
Gajendra.
13125
The term _____ refers to a grandson in the genealogical 
descriptions.
Pautra
13126
Identify the sons of Satyadev mentioned in the Sultanpur lineage.
Lakshmikant and Ghanshyam.
13127
In the Sultanpur Parsabani records, who are the sons of Chaudhary 
Uchitlal?
Indranand, Chumitlal, Satyanarayan, and Panchanand.
13128
Who are the sons of Indranand mentioned in the Parsabani branch?
Muktinath (alias Kailash), Krishnakant, and Shaktinath.
13129
The section 'Khandwala Dyori Mool' focuses on the lineage residing 
in which village?
Ramai.
13130
In the records of the Ramai branch, who are the sons of Devkant?
Ranjit, Sumit, and Raja.
13131
Who are the sons of Navkant in the Ramai genealogical branch?
Sujit and Viddu.
13132
Identify the sons of Bhimm mentioned in the Ramai branch lineage. Premkant.
13133
The heading 'Atha Darihara Kusumal Mool' refers to which 
ancestral branch?
The Darihara Kusumal (or Kusmaul) branch.
13134
In the Darihara records, who are the sons of Chandramani?
Gorelal and Chhedi.
13135
Identify the sons of Hridyanath mentioned in the Darihara records.
Savalal, Kusumlal, and Dani.
13136
Who are the sons of Savalal in the Darihara lineage?
Narsingh, Tulakant, Tarakant, and Lakshmikant.
13137
Which son of Tarakant is mentioned in the Darihara records?
Vinod and Arun.
13138
Identify the sons of Vinod mentioned in the Darihara lineage.
Ajit and Sanjit.
13139
In the Sultanpur Bhatiyaahi branch, who are the two sons of Bulan? Ramanand and Parmanand.
13140
The term 'Patni' is consistently used in the text to signify the _____ 
of an individual.
Wife
13141
Which son of Ramanand is mentioned in the Sultanpur Bhatiyaahi 
records?
Murlinarayanpur.
13142
In the Darihara Fulbadia branch, who are the sons of Baidyanath?
Gunanand and Lilanand.
13143
Who is recorded as the son of Gunanand in the Fulbadia records?
Ashish.
13144
Identify the children of Jagannath in the Darihara Fulbadia records.
Shaligram, Vimal, and Manoj.
13145
Which son of Gajendra is recorded in the Darihara Fulbadia lineage? Munnu.
13146
In the Darihara Fulbadia branch, who are the sons of Devendra?
Amarendra, Subhash, and Avadhesh.
13147
Identify the daughters of Kamalanand in the Jamua branch.
Chandrakala, Suryakala, Pavankala, Subhara, Shubhakala, and 
Shashikala.
13148
Who are the sons of Mahidhar (alias Ghutar) mentioned in the 
records?
Haladhar.
13149
Identify the sons of Haladhar in the genealogical record.
Harikant, Kalikant, Sudhakant, and Gopikant.
13150
In the lineage of Shridhar, who are the sons of Yashodhar?
Kamalakant, Dayakant, Mayakant, and Suryakant.
